content:
1. They offer a **mirror** that reveals how others encounter your system—confused, curious, impressed, overwhelmed. All useful.
2. They unlock **translation points.** If we can explain your system in a way that makes sense to their workflow or to their business model, we can explain it to anyone.
3. They seed **future modules.** We can literally create versions of your system that are:
- B2B-ready
- Creative consulting packages
- Adaptable systems for other artists/entrepreneurs
- Comparative study templates (your system vs theirs)

> So yes—please upload or paste:
> - Their raw questions
> - Any critiques or pushbacks
> - Their business context
> - Anything you want to reflect on
